customerService.mastercardDescription: Our preferred payment method is via a secure card transaction. Rest assured, your card number will be protected using industry-leading encryption standards. We guarantee a safe shopping experience on our website.
customerService.creditLimitNote: The total amount is allocated when your card is approved. If the amount exceeds your credit limit, order is not confirmed.
customerService.knetDescription: KNET is another choice for processing online payments through our website. This feature will only be applicable for local orders made exclusively in Kuwait.
customerService.knetSecurity: Covered with up-to-date safety and security technology
customerService.codDescription: For all online transactions made exclusively in Kuwait, you can choose the cash on delivery method where payment is processed upon delivery.
customerService.codFeeNote: Payment processed as per transaction fee details
customerService.title: Exchange & Returns
customerService.intro: At Bianca Nera, our prime concern is our customer’s satisfaction. We want you to be extremely happy with all your purchases.
customerService.rule1: Exchanges and returns are accepted within only 24 hours after receiving your product.
customerService.rule2: Exchanges and returns are accepted only if the product is in the same condition as when received: unworn, undamaged, with original tags and packaging (if applicable).
customerService.rule3: Any altered apparel or customized product cannot be exchanged or returned.
customerService.rule4: Bianca Nera reserves the right to determine if the returned or exchanged product is still in its original condition.
customerService.refundOnline: Online payments (Visa, MasterCard, Knet): refunded amount will be reversed to your bank account; allow time for processing.
customerService.refundCOD: Cash on delivery (Kuwait & Qatar only): refunded amount will be returned in cash.
customerService.deliveryCharges: Delivery charges while returning/exchanging are applicable; free delivery applies only to first order before exchange/refund request.
customerService.taxesDuties: Duties, taxes or additional tariffs will not be refunded and are customer responsibility.
customerService.contactPrompt: Please contact our Customer Service department to process any return or exchange request.
customerService.outsideHours: If outside regular working hours, mail customercare@bianca-nera.com or send message; we will reply soon.

shippingInformation.title: Shipping Information
shippingInformation.condition1: Timelines for orders delivery start as soon as you receive an order confirmation after placing your order online.
shippingInformation.condition2: As soon as your order is confirmed and accepted by us, you'll receive another email stating that your order has been shipped from our warehouses.
shippingInformation.condition3: We will make sure to deliver your items within our stated delivery time, however we are not responsible for delivery failures due to reasons beyond our control.
shippingInformation.condition4: Delivery timeframes are calculated based on your location and apply only to working days (excluding public holidays).
shippingInformation.firstDeliveryDesc: Biancanera handles all first-time delivery fees
shippingInformation.internationalNoteDesc: Additional customs duties or taxes may apply based on:
shippingInformation.feesNote: These fees cannot be determined in advance.
shippingInformation.customerServiceAvailable: Our customer service team is available to assist with any order-related inquiries.
shippingInformation.addressChangesDesc: Contact us to change delivery address or schedule
shippingInformation.noChangesAfterDispatch: No changes allowed once order is dispatched
shippingInformation.contactDesc: Contact our customer service team for any shipping-related questions.

paymentMethods.creditLimitNote: The total amount is allocated when your card is approved. If the amount exceeds your credit limit, order is canceled.
paymentMethods.knetDescription: KNET is another choice for processing online payments through our website. This feature will only be applicable for local orders made exclusively in Kuwait.
paymentMethods.knetSecurity: Covered with up-to-date safety and security technology
